TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mnarux gang baraq = Uka bay hhnang mi mangal bay knuudus uri ka mnarux gang baraq, saw hari uka balay rngaw pqtaan mnarux na ka tnpusu ciida, kiya uri u tquwan dha qmita mnarux baraq, msiyaq mi msima dnii. Knrinah spac tntunan mnarux gang baraq wada knttanan knnaqah mnarux na kiya klaun balay mangal da, kiya ka duma 1 tntruan wada sndalan ciida ida nangal tuturu tntunan mnarux gang baraq. Ma uka pqtaan mnarux mnwaya ka gang baraq hu? Kiya mi ini eniq ka tnpusu pqtaan mnarux gang baraq, balay bay mslxan ka pusu pnyahan na. qntaan ta nanaq mnarux mi ini knmalu, kiya qbubur ta ruwan urac ndaan cmiyuk pstutuy qbuhur, kiya ka kiya mi baraq ta ruwan u tikuh bay saw urac dudux, kiya mi mthuway mrana mhru, kiya mmanu pwla hnyuwan Gang baraq balay bay "uka qnita na nanaq" . Tmiyu ka Ameylika cicinghuwey, ou bay smapuh pwla mnarux gang baraq uxay quri smuung mnarux gang baraq kana mi pswaaw kmuruy ciida pkluwan sndalan dha. Niqan mngari ka prdingan sblyaqun qmita marux gang baraq. Truma nii u ya balay prdingan pcriyu mnarux gang baraq bnkuwan sediq mnarux gang baraq, binaw pqtaan mnarux nii u ya ana sediq kiya ini mtna. Basi saw pcriyu ou balay rnngawan hnyuwan mnarux, mi kkdiyax neou daw, asi su ka psiling ising kklaun ddaun. Kingal, qbsiyaq msiyaq ini kmalu. Dha, qtai kluwan msiyak. Turu, uka saw uuda u mtbiyax bay pshngak na uri. Spac, mnarux brah, mnarux hwirang mi mnarux bukuy. Rima, bhangan hnang pshnang hiya nanak. Mturu, wada mppruyux ka hnang na. Mpitu, wada kndudul mlih ka chdilan qbubur. Mspac, lmnglung saw hari mnarux ka buuc hiyi. Mngari, saw bay msnuul qbubur ka mnarux tunux. Rahuq na niya niqan mi prdingan pnteanaq saw quri mnarux gang baraq , saw ka: wada bay mowic ka hiyi. Kiya wada thdil rahuq na tlungan qbubur ka rhak gang mnarux naqah, kiya balay niqan pqtaan mnarux gang baraq ruma nii: ini kkmkan. Spuyan dara Mnurux buuc uxay uri u murung buuc, saw hari mniq bukuy uxay uri tpaqan. Musa thdil luqi tunux ka mnarux gang baraq, wada daan ppriyux pwasut urac kksaan qbubur, pqtaan mnarux na u niqan saw mnarux tunux, mtnuwil tunux, mmiric, uka biyax ka bawa mi qaqay uxay uri u mssi, pnduwa sndrxan qbubur. Wada thdilan rumul ka mnarux gang baraq, kiya psluun na mcayis hiyi da. Mlabu ka mquru pupuk, saw mniq waru uxay uri u mniq tlungan buuc hwirang. Nasi su niqan ndaan mnarux tnsapah gang baraq uxay uri u luhay mkan pukan, ya balay musa su pnsdhu diyax pswaaw kmuruy, pwela hari musa pqita isngan, kiya tduwa pkrana spngan knuudus mnarux gang baraq nii.
S.PHON: = mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq = uka baj ńßńßnaŇč mi maŇčal baj knuudus u…ĺi ka mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, saw ńßa…ĺi uka balaj …ĺŇčaw pqtaan mna…ĺux na ka tnpusu ¶iida, kija u…ĺi u tquwan dńßa qmita mna…ĺux ba…ĺaq, msijaq mi msima dnii. kn…ĺinańß spa ¶ tntunan mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq wada knttanan knnaqańß mna…ĺux na kija klaun balaj maŇčal da, kija ka duma * tnt…ĺuan wada sndalan ¶iida ida naŇčal tutu…ĺu tntunan mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq. ma uka pqtaan mna…ĺux mnwaja ka gaŇč ba…ĺaq ńßu? kija mi ini …ôniq ka tnpusu pqtaan mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, balaj baj mslxan ka pusu pnjańßan na. qntaan ta nanaq mna…ĺux mi ini knmalu, kija qbubu…ĺ ta …ĺuwan u…ĺa ¶ ndaan ¶mijuk pstutuj qbuńßu…ĺ, kija ka kija mi ba…ĺaq ta …ĺuwan u tikuńß baj saw u…ĺa ¶ dudux, kija mi mtńßuwaj m…ĺana mńß…ĺu, kija mmanu pwla ńßnjuwan gaŇč ba…ĺaq balaj baj "uka qnita na nanaq" . tmiju ka am…ôlika ¶i ¶iŇčńßuw…ô, ou baj smapuńß pwla mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq uxaj qu…ĺi smuuŇč mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq kana mi pswaaw kmu…ĺuj ¶iida pkluwan sndalan dńßa. niqan mŇča…ĺi ka p…ĺdiŇčan sbljaqun qmita ma…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq. t…ĺuma nii u ja balaj p…ĺdiŇčan p ¶…ĺiju mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq bnkuwan s…ôdiq mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, binaw pqtaan mna…ĺux nii u ja ana s…ôdiq kija ini mtna. basi saw p ¶…ĺiju ou balaj …ĺnŇčawan ńßnjuwan mna…ĺux, mi kkdijax n…ôou daw, asi su ka psiliŇč isiŇč kklaun ddaun. kiŇčal, qbsijaq msijaq ini kmalu. dńßa, qtai kluwan msijak. tu…ĺu, uka saw uuda u mtbijax baj psńßŇčak na u…ĺi. spa ¶, mna…ĺux b…ĺańß, mna…ĺux ńßwi…ĺaŇč mi mna…ĺux bukuj. …ĺima, bńßaŇčan ńßnaŇč psńßnaŇč ńßija nanak. mtu…ĺu, wada mpp…ĺujux ka ńßnaŇč na. mpitu, wada kndudul mlińß ka ¶ńßdilan qbubu…ĺ. mspa ¶, lmŇčluŇč saw ńßa…ĺi mna…ĺux ka buu ¶ ńßiji. mŇča…ĺi, saw baj msnuul qbubu…ĺ ka mna…ĺux tunux. …ĺańßuq na nija niqan mi p…ĺdiŇčan pnt…ôanaq saw qu…ĺi mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq , saw ka: wada baj mowi ¶ ka ńßiji. kija wada tńßdil …ĺańßuq na tluŇčan qbubu…ĺ ka …ĺńßak gaŇč mna…ĺux naqańß, kija balaj niqan pqtaan mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq …ĺuma nii: ini kkmkan. spujan da…ĺa mnu…ĺux buu ¶ uxaj u…ĺi u mu…ĺuŇč buu ¶, saw ńßa…ĺi mniq bukuj uxaj u…ĺi tpaqan. musa tńßdil luqi tunux ka mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, wada daan pp…ĺijux pwasut u…ĺa ¶ kksaan qbubu…ĺ, pqtaan mna…ĺux na u niqan saw mna…ĺux tunux, mtnuwil tunux, mmi…ĺi ¶, uka bijax ka bawa mi qaqaj uxaj u…ĺi u mssi, pnduwa snd…ĺxan qbubu…ĺ. wada tńßdilan …ĺumul ka mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, kija psluun na m ¶ajis ńßiji da. mlabu ka mqu…ĺu pupuk, saw mniq wa…ĺu uxaj u…ĺi u mniq tluŇčan buu ¶ ńßwi…ĺaŇč. nasi su niqan ndaan mna…ĺux tnsapańß gaŇč ba…ĺaq uxaj u…ĺi u luńßaj mkan pukan, ja balaj musa su pnsdńßu dijax pswaaw kmu…ĺuj, pw…ôla ńßa…ĺi musa pqita isŇčan, kija tduwa pk…ĺana spŇčan knuudus mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq nii.
S.FORM: = Mnarux gang baraq = Uka bay hhnang mi mangal bay knuudus uri ka mnarux gang baraq, saw hari uka balay rngaw pqtaan mnarux na ka tnpusu ciida, kiya uri u tquwan dha qmita mnarux baraq, msiyaq mi msima dnii. Knrinah spac tntunan mnarux gang baraq wada knttanan knnaqah mnarux na kiya klaun balay mangal da, kiya ka duma 1 tntruan wada sndalan ciida ida nangal tuturu tntunan mnarux gang baraq. Ma uka pqtaan mnarux mnwaya ka gang baraq hu? Kiya mi ini eniq ka tnpusu pqtaan mnarux gang baraq, balay bay mslxan ka pusu pnyahan na. qntaan ta nanaq mnarux mi ini knmalu, kiya qbubur ta ruwan urac ndaan cmiyuk pstutuy qbuhur, kiya ka kiya mi baraq ta ruwan u tikuh bay saw urac dudux, kiya mi mthuway mrana mhru, kiya mmanu pwla hnyuwan Gang baraq balay bay "uka qnita na nanaq" . Tmiyu ka Ameylika cicinghuwey, ou bay smapuh pwla mnarux gang baraq uxay quri smuung mnarux gang baraq kana mi pswaaw kmuruy ciida pkluwan sndalan dha. Niqan mngari ka prdingan sblyaqun qmita marux gang baraq. Truma nii u ya balay prdingan pcriyu mnarux gang baraq bnkuwan sediq mnarux gang baraq, binaw pqtaan mnarux nii u ya ana sediq kiya ini mtna. Basi saw pcriyu ou balay rnngawan hnyuwan mnarux, mi kkdiyax neou daw, asi su ka psiling ising kklaun ddaun. Kingal, qbsiyaq msiyaq ini kmalu. Dha, qtai kluwan msiyak. Turu, uka saw uuda u mtbiyax bay pshngak na uri. Spac, mnarux brah, mnarux hwirang mi mnarux bukuy. Rima, bhangan hnang pshnang hiya nanak. Mturu, wada mppruyux ka hnang na. Mpitu, wada kndudul mlih ka chdilan qbubur. Mspac, lmnglung saw hari mnarux ka buuc hiyi. Mngari, saw bay msnuul qbubur ka mnarux tunux. Rahuq na niya niqan mi prdingan pnteanaq saw quri mnarux gang baraq , saw ka: wada bay mowic ka hiyi. Kiya wada thdil rahuq na tlungan qbubur ka rhak gang mnarux naqah, kiya balay niqan pqtaan mnarux gang baraq ruma nii: ini kkmkan. Spuyan dara Mnurux buuc uxay uri u murung buuc, saw hari mniq bukuy uxay uri tpaqan. Musa thdil luqi tunux ka mnarux gang baraq, wada daan ppriyux pwasut urac kksaan qbubur, pqtaan mnarux na u niqan saw mnarux tunux, mtnuwil tunux, mmiric, uka biyax ka bawa mi qaqay uxay uri u mssi, pnduwa sndrxan qbubur. Wada thdilan rumul ka mnarux gang baraq, kiya psluun na mcayis hiyi da. Mlabu ka mquru pupuk, saw mniq waru uxay uri u mniq tlungan buuc hwirang. Nasi su niqan ndaan mnarux tnsapah gang baraq uxay uri u luhay mkan pukan, ya balay musa su pnsdhu diyax pswaaw kmuruy, pwela hari musa pqita isngan, kiya tduwa pkrana spngan knuudus mnarux gang baraq nii.

ba…ĺaq, msijaq mi msima dnii. kn…ĺinańß spa ¶ tntunan mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq wada knttanan knnaqańß mna…ĺux na kija klaun balaj maŇčal da, kija ka duma * tnt…ĺuan wada sndalan ¶iida ida naŇčal tutu…ĺu tu…ĺu, uka saw uuda u mtbijax baj psńßŇčak na u…ĺi. spa ¶, mna…ĺux b…ĺańß, mna…ĺux ńßwi…ĺaŇč mi mna…ĺux bukuj. …ĺima, bńßaŇčan ńßnaŇč psńßnaŇč ńßija nanak. mtu…ĺu, wada mpp…ĺujux ka ńßnaŇč na. mpitu, wada kndudul mlińß ka ¶ńßdilan qbubu…ĺ. mspa ¶, lmŇčluŇč saw ńßa…ĺi mna…ĺux ka buu ¶ ńßiji. mŇča…ĺi, saw baj msnuul qbubu…ĺ ka mna…ĺux tunux. …ĺańßuq na nija niqan mi p…ĺdiŇčan pnt…ôanaq saw qu…ĺi mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq , saw ka: wada baj mowi ¶ ka ńßiji. kija wada tńßdil …ĺańßuq na tluŇčan qbubu…ĺ ka …ĺńßak gaŇč mna…ĺux naqańß, kija balaj niqan pqtaan mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq …ĺuma nii: ini kkmkan. spujan da…ĺa mnu…ĺux buu ¶ uxaj u…ĺi u mu…ĺuŇč buu ¶, saw ńßa…ĺi mniq bukuj uxaj u…ĺi tpaqan. musa tńßdil luqi tunux ka mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, wada daan pp…ĺijux pwasut u…ĺa ¶ kksaan qbubu…ĺ, pqtaan mna…ĺux na u niqan saw mna…ĺux tunux, mtnuwil tunux, mmi…ĺi ¶, uka bijax ka bawa mi qaqaj uxaj u…ĺi u mssi, pnduwa snd…ĺxan qbubu…ĺ. wada tńßdilan …ĺumul ka mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq, kija psluun na m ¶ajis ńßiji da. mlabu ka mqu…ĺu pupuk, saw mniq wa…ĺu uxaj u…ĺi u mniq tluŇčan buu ¶ ńßwi…ĺaŇč. nasi su niqan ndaan mna…ĺux tnsapańß gaŇč ba…ĺaq uxaj u…ĺi u luńßaj mkan pukan, ja balaj musa su pnsdńßu dijax pswaaw kmu…ĺuj, pw…ôla ńßa…ĺi musa pqita isŇčan, kija tduwa pk…ĺana spŇčan knuudus mna…ĺux gaŇč ba…ĺaq nii.
